headline: MSCI Announces the Results of the MSCI 2026 Global Market Accessibility Review
summary: NEW YORK, June 18, 2026--MSCI released the results of the MSCI 2026 Global Market Accessibility Review. The detailed report, covering market accessibility assessments for 79 markets, has been made available on www.msci.com/market-classification.

headline: MSCI Inc.: A Passive Investing Toll Booth At A Discounted Price
summary: MSCI Inc. benefits from structural growth in passive investing, driving recurring revenues through index licensing and asset-based fees. Read more on MSCI stock here.
